title: Senior AI Development Engineer
description:
Lumenci is building and scaling an agentic AI platform (Lumenci AI) with a suite of enterprise\\-grade B2B products focused on patent analysis, IP strategy, and legal workflows. As we move from early builds to production at scale, we are looking for a seasoned Senior AI Development Engineer to anchor this journey — someone who has built AI\\-powered products end\\-to\\-end, either at a startup (0→1 ownership) or within a large enterprise where they owned meaningful AI initiatives. This role sits at the intersection of large language models, enterprise product development, and complex legal\\-IP domain knowledge, and is ideal for someone ready to own both strategy and execution in a high\\-impact environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities And Duties**
* AI Product Strategy \\& Roadmap
+ Define and own the AI product vision and roadmap, aligned with Lumenci's business objectives and client needs
+ Identify high\\-impact opportunities for applying AI/LLMs across patent analysis, prior art mapping, claim generation, and IP workflow automation
+ Evaluate build vs. partner decisions for AI capabilities; assess and integrate third\\-party AI tools where appropriate
+ ranslate complex AI capabilities into clear product value for enterprise clients and internal stakeholders

* Architecture \\& Technical Leadership
+ Lead the design of scalable, production\\-grade AI systems — including LLM pipelines, RAG architectures, agentic workflows, and evaluation frameworks
+ Define technical standards for AI reliability, latency, accuracy, and safety in a legal/IP context
+ Drive decisions on model selection, fine\\-tuning, prompt engineering, and inference optimization
+ Establish robust evaluation and monitoring frameworks to track agent performance in production

* End\\-to\\-End Product Execution
+ Lead cross\\-functional squads from problem definition to production deployment
+ Champion adoption of AI\\-led workflows across client projects and internal teams by defining use cases, piloting solutions, training users, and continuously iterating based on real\\-world feedback and performance data
+ Write clear PRDs, epics, technical specifications, and acceptance criteria that engineering teams can act on immediately
+ Maintain delivery momentum across internal engineers, AI researchers, and external partners
+ Apply structured problem\\-solving (root\\-cause analysis, 5 Whys) to diagnose failure modes in AI systems and product gaps

* Stakeholder Management \\& Communication
+ Act as the primary AI product voice with senior leadership, enterprise clients, and cross\\-functional teams
+ Communicate trade\\-offs, progress, and risks clearly — both written and verbal — at all levels of the organization
+ Build alignment between strategic OKRs and day\\-to\\-day execution priorities


**Education And Experience**
* Experience \\& Background
+ 7–10 years of experience in AI product management, AI engineering, or applied AI roles
+ Demonstrated track record of building and shipping enterprise\\-grade AI products — either at a startup (0→1 ownership) or within a large enterprise (meaningful AI initiatives at scale)
+ Deep hands\\-on experience with LLMs in production: prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, agentic frameworks, hallucination mitigation, and latency management
+ Experience working with or leading cross\\-functional teams (engineering, product, domain experts, data science)

* Technical Depth
+ Strong understanding of AI/ML system design — model selection, fine\\-tuning, vector search, embedding models, inference optimization
+ Proficiency with LLM frameworks and tooling (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI APIs, HuggingFace, or equivalent)
+ Ability to evaluate LLM output quality using automated metrics (precision, recall, BLEU, ROUGE) and human\\-in\\-the\\-loop evaluation
+ Comfortable working closely with code — prototyping workflows, reviewing architecture, or building high\\-grade prototypes independently

* Product \\& Leadership Skills
+ Strong product instincts: ability to move from ambiguous problem to structured roadmap to shipped feature
+ Experience working in Agile/Lean environments; comfortable leading as a Scrum Master or product owner
+ Excellent communication and stakeholder management; able to simplify complexity for non\\-technical audiences
+ High ownership mindset — equally comfortable setting strategy and rolling up sleeves to execute

* Startup Mindset
+ Thrives in lean, high\\-ownership environments with evolving priorities
+ Comfortable wearing multiple hats and solving problems outside a traditional scope
+ Energized by rapid learning curves and cross\\-functional collaboration
+ Bias toward action — ships incrementally rather than waiting for perfection

* Domain Knowledge (Nice to Have)
+ Familiarity with intellectual property, patent law, or legal workflows
+ Understanding of patent invalidation strategies (novelty, obviousness) and infringement analysis
+ Background in legal tech, IP, or other specialized B2B domains
+ Experience with multi\\-modal AI systems or document intelligence applications

description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
**Role Purpose** 




 The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
 


 ͏
 
**Do** 




 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
 


* Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
* Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
* Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
* Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
* Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
* Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
* Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities


 ͏
 
 2\\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
 


* Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
* Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
* Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
* Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
* Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
* Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
* Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
* Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
* Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
* Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders


 ͏
 
 3\\. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
 


* Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
* Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
* Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
* Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
* Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
* Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
* Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
* Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally

**No.**

title: Software Intern
description:
**Job description:** 




 Join our team as a Software Intern (Flutter Intern).
 



 Are you ready to transform lines of code into seamless digital experiences? We are looking for a visionary student or aspiring developer to join our inner circle for a high\\-impact, Apprentice\\- educational internship focused on the future of cross\\-platform mastery.
 



 The Ambience
 



 We don’t just "build apps"; we architect digital ecosystems. You’ll be stepping into a fast\\-paced, sophisticated environment where the Flutter framework is our canvas . This isn’t about fetching coffee; it’s about fetching APIs and mastering the art of the widget.
 



 The Journey
 



 Architectural Fluency: Dive deep into the Flutter SDK, learning to build beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase.
 



 Skill Synthesis: Beyond just UI, you’ll explore state management, clean architecture, and the latest in software design patterns.
 



 Collaborative Mastery: Work alongside seasoned mentors who are obsessed with performance and pixel\\-perfection.
 



 Who You Are
 



 The Eternal Student: You possess an insatiable hunger for new skills and a "day one" mentality.
 



 The Flutter Enthusiast: You’ve tinkered with flutter or any software and are ready to move from "Hello World" to high\\-fidelity production.
 



 The Sophisticate: You appreciate clean code, elegant solutions, and the nuance of a well\\-placed animation.
 



 The Reward (Beyond the Wallet)
 



 While this role is unpaid, the "interest" you earn is in high\\-value professional equity:
 



 Direct Mentorship: One\\-on\\-one guidance from developers who have been in the trenches.
 



 Portfolio Prestige: Tangible contributions to a live, sophisticated platform.
 



 Network Access: An entry point into an elite circle of tech innovators.
 



 Academic Synergy: We are happy to coordinate with your university for course credit.
 



 Ready to redefine your trajectory?
 



 Send us your GitHub, your most ambitious project, or a brief manifesto on why you’re ready to be part of our team.
 



*Let’s build something timeless.* 




  




-

title: Software Dev Engineer-II, Infra Supply Chain Automation
description:
**Description**
 AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
   

  

 You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
   

  

 These are all greenfield projects offering a rare opportunity to build systems from the ground up. You will be part of a new organization within AWS building large scale distributed applications. We will be designing and developing these systems from scratch utilizing technologies and frameworks like reactive micro services, serverless computing and distributed NoSQL data stores.
   

  

 If you have a solid understanding of fundamental algorithms and system design and are able to produce bulletproof code, we are looking for you. To succeed in this role, you must be passionate about delivering high\\-quality designs and components. You must be creative in solving hard problems and unafraid to think out\\-of\\-the\\-box.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Solve complex architecture and business problems to come up with extensible solutions.
* Write high quality code that are modular, functional and testable.
* Formally mentor junior engineers on design, coding and troubleshooting.
* Communicate, collaborate and work effectively in a global environment.


**About The Team**
 About the team
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
**Software Engineering Intern (Remote)** 




**Company:** 
 TinySlash
 



**Job Type:** 
 Internship
 



**Duration:** 
 6 Months
 



**Work Mode:** 
 Remote
 



**Location:** 
 India
 



**Compensation:** 
 Paid Internship (details shared during selection)
 



  





**Company Overview** 




**TinySlash is a software company building a URL\\-shortening and link management platform that helps users create secure, trackable, and branded links. The platform includes features such as link analytics, click tracking, and QR code generation.** 




  





**Role Overview** 




**TinySlash is hiring Software Engineering Interns** 
 for a
 **6\\-month remote internship** 
 . This role is intended for candidates interested in software development and who are seeking structured, hands\\-on experience contributing to a live web application.
 



 This posting is for
 **one internship role** 
 with responsibilities across frontend and backend development.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Assist in developing and maintaining web application features
* Work on frontend components using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
* Support backend development tasks such as API integration and data handling
* Write clean, readable, and testable code
* Fix bugs and assist in performance improvements
* Collaborate with team members through code reviews and discussions



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Basic knowledge of programming using Java or JavaScript
* Understanding of web fundamentals (HTML, CSS, HTTP, APIs)
* Familiarity with databases (SQL or NoSQL is acceptable)
* Experience using Git or any version control system
* Ability to work remotely and communicate effectively



  





**Eligibility** 



* Students or recent graduates in Computer Science, IT, or related fields
* Candidates legally eligible to work as interns from their location



  





**What We Offer** 



* Paid remote internship
* Structured learning with engineering mentorship
* Experience working on a production software platform
* Internship completion certificate



  





**Application Process** 




**Shortlisted candidates will be contacted directly by the TinySlash team for further evaluation.**

title: Software development Engineer, Device Management Systems, India
description:
**Description**
 We are the cloud platform solution provider for the Device businesses ranging from the E\\-Reader to Echo Family of Devices and expanding into third\\-party devices that connect to Amazon eco\\-system.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Define the long term technical strategy and architecture vision for device management, leveraging new technologies to deliver features to our customers.
* Think big and continuously pitch for foundational solutions that will help device businesses to use these solutions, where applicable, instead of building their own.
* Define technical approach to ensure data privacy is considered while providing foundational solutions.
* Partner with each device team to understand their customer needs and influence adoption of new services.
* Possess expert knowledge in performance, scalability, enterprise system architecture, and engineering best practices.
* Assist in the career development of others, actively mentoring individuals and the Amazon developer community on advanced technical issues and helping managers guide the career growth of their team members.


 A day in the life
   

  

* Communicate with other business teams in E\\-Reader/Tablet/Fire\\-TV/Alexa to name a few.
* Collect the business requirements,
* Help describe software product features,
* Build technical designs and architecture.
* Write code with at most care for customer data's security and customer's privacy.


**About The Team**
 The Device Management Services (DMS) organization is specialized in building foundational platform solutions that cater to a number of critical customer experiences.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of non\\-internship professional software development experience
* 2\\+ years of non\\-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience programming with at least one software programming language


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company**
